title: epi2me-labs/wf-transcriptomes
description: Long-read transcriptome analysis using bambu with optional SQANTI3 QC, DESeq2, and DEXSeq.

main_options.title: Main Options
main_options.description: Parameters for read ingestion, and setting reference and transcriptome construction mode.

fastq.title: FASTQ
fastq.help_text: You can provide a single FASTQ, a folder of FASTQs, or a multiplexed folder containing one sub-folder per sample or barcode.

bam.description: BAM or uBAM reads to analyse.
bam.help_text: You can provide a single BAM or uBAM, a folder of BAMs, or a multiplexed folder containing one sub-folder per sample or barcode.

ref_genome.title: Reference genome
ref_genome.help_text: Required in both discover and fixed_annotation modes.

ref_annotation.title: Reference annotation
ref_annotation.description: Reference transcript annotation in GTF or GFF format.
ref_annotation.help_text: Required in both discover and fixed_annotation modes.

transcriptome_mode.description: How bambu should prepare the transcriptome model.
transcriptome_mode.help_text: Use discover for reference-guided transcript discovery and quantification, or fixed_annotation for quantification only against the supplied annotation.

direct_rna.description: Set this for direct RNA sequencing libraries.

analyse_unclassified.description: Include unclassified reads from multiplexed input directories.

analyse_fail.description: Include fail reads from bam_fail and fastq_fail folders found in sample folders on the input path.

sample_options.title: Sample Options
sample_options.description: Parameters that control sample naming and experimental design.

sample_sheet.title: Sample sheet
sample_sheet.description: CSV file describing barcodes, aliases, and optional experimental design columns.
sample_sheet.help_text: For multiplexed runs, the sample sheet should contain both barcode and alias. For differential analysis it must also contain alias, the condition column, and any extra columns named in `--covariates`.

sample.description: Single sample name for singleplexed input or to restrict multiplexed analysis to one sample.

de_analysis_options.title: Differential Expression Analysis Options
de_analysis_options.description: Parameters controlling DGE and DTU analyses.

de_analysis.description: Run differential gene expression and differential transcript usage analyses.

condition_column.description: Main comparison column in the sample sheet.

covariates.description: Comma-separated extra sample-sheet columns to adjust for, for example batch.
covariates.help_text: Each listed name must exist as a column in the sample sheet.

reference_level.description: Baseline group for the main comparison column.
reference_level.help_text: If omitted, the workflow will use control when that level exists.

igv.description: Generate an IGV configuration file for the aligned BAM outputs.

advanced_options.title: Advanced Options
advanced_options.description: Performance tuning and tool-specific advanced parameters.

threads.description: Thread count to use for the core workflow processes.

mod_codes.description: Comma-separated modified base codes to pass to modkit pileup.
mod_codes.help_text: Provide values accepted by `modkit pileup --modified-bases`, for example `A:a,C:m`. If omitted, the workflow infers `primary_base:mod_code` pairs from the BAM with `modkit modbam check-tags`.

force_alignment.description: Force re-alignment of input BAM files.
force_alignment.help_text: Read alignment is skipped if the existing sequence names in the aligned BAM match the provided reference. Enable this if the existing alignments used incorrect minimap2 presets (e.g. missing --splice or direct RNA settings).

ndr.description: Optional bambu novel discovery rate override.

sqanti_skip_orf.description: Skip ORF prediction during SQANTI3 QC.

disable_ping.description: Enable to prevent sending a workflow ping.

resources.run_time: Varies with read depth and sample count; expect a small single-sample run to finish in under 30 minutes with the recommended resources.
